payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped view of a dark-stained wooden side table showing a curved/turned front leg and lower stretcher shelf with a glossy finish; table top is mostly out of frame and the piece sits adjacent to black leather seating — estimated distance ~0.6 m from camera.
